response.justification: Bogdan has a strong 15+ year software engineering career with staff-level seniority, relevant MCP and agentic infrastructure work at re:cinq, and proven AWS and TypeScript experience. However, the role requires 8+ years of production-grade AI development, and his AI-specific work appears to have begun only in April 2025. Critical gaps include the absence of Python from his skill set, no documented experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. The customer-facing, forward-deployed consulting dimension of the role also lacks supporting evidence.
strengths: Active MCP (Model Context Protocol) framework development directly matches a listed key technology for the role
Staff-level title with demonstrated mentoring, public workshops, and cross-functional technical leadership throughout career
AWS CDK and high-throughput microservices data integration experience at scale (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list and resume narrative despite being the primary language for AI/ML work in this role
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks anywhere in the resume
Substantive AI and agentic work is limited to the current role starting April 2025, far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions

key_factors.factor: Missing core AI stack (Python, RAG, vector DBs, LLM optimization)
MCP and agentic infrastructure work at current role
